<xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><variables><variable type="String" id="textmcr">textmcr</variable><variable type="Entity" id="entitymcr">entitymcr</variable></variables><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="59" y="80"><field name="trigger">chat_sent</field><next><block type="variables_set_entity"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:entitymcr</field><value name="VAL"><block type="custom_dependency_entity"><field name="NAME">entity</field></block></value><next><block type="variables_set_string"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:textmcr</field><value name="VAL"><block type="custom_dependency_string"><field name="NAME">text</field></block></value><next><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">// 使用局部变量 textmcr 和 entitymcr&#10;if (textmcr == null || !textmcr.startsWith("!docker")) return;&#10;&#10;if (!(entitymcr instanceof net.minecraft.server.level.ServerPlayer)) return;&#10;net.minecraft.server.level.ServerPlayer player = (net.minecraft.server.level.ServerPlayer) entitymcr;&#10;&#10;if (!player.hasPermissions(4)) {&#10;    player.sendSystemMessage(net.minecraft.network.chat.Component.literal("§c需要 OP 权限"));&#10;    return;&#10;}&#10;&#10;String dockerArgs = textmcr.substring(7).trim();&#10;if (dockerArgs.isEmpty()) {&#10;    player.sendSystemMessage(net.minecraft.network.chat.Component.literal("§e用法：!docker <docker命令>  例如 !docker ps"));&#10;    return;&#10;}&#10;&#10;// 检测操作系统&#10;String os = System.getProperty("os.name").toLowerCase();&#10;boolean isWindows = os.contains("win");&#10;&#10;// 危险符号列表（根据系统不同）&#10;String[] dangerous;&#10;if (isWindows) {&#10;    // Windows cmd 的危险符号：|, &, &&, ||, ; 等&#10;    dangerous = new String[]{"|", "&", ";", "&&", "||"};&#10;} else {&#10;    // Linux/Unix shell 的危险符号：|, &, ;, &&, ||, $, `, (, ), <, >, 换行等&#10;    dangerous = new String[]{"|", "&", ";", "&&", "||", "$", "`", "(", ")", "<", ">", "
", ""};&#10;}&#10;for (String sym : dangerous) {&#10;    if (dockerArgs.contains(sym)) {&#10;        player.sendSystemMessage(net.minecraft.network.chat.Component.literal("§c不允许使用危险符号: " + sym));&#10;        return;&#10;    }&#10;}&#10;&#10;// 根据操作系统构建完整命令&#10;String fullCommand;&#10;if (isWindows) {&#10;    fullCommand = "cmd /c docker " + dockerArgs;&#10;} else {&#10;    // Linux/Unix 使用 bash -c，并对单引号简单转义&#10;    String escaped = dockerArgs.replace("'", "'\''");&#10;    fullCommand = "bash -c 'docker " + escaped + "'";&#10;}&#10;&#10;try {&#10;    Process process = Runtime.getRuntime().exec(fullCommand);&#10;    java.io.BufferedReader stdInput = new java.io.BufferedReader(new java.io.InputStreamReader(process.getInputStream()));&#10;    java.io.BufferedReader stdError = new java.io.BufferedReader(new java.io.InputStreamReader(process.getErrorStream()));&#10;    StringBuilder output = new StringBuilder();&#10;    String line;&#10;    while ((line = stdInput.readLine()) != null) output.append(line).append("
");&#10;    while ((line = stdError.readLine()) != null) output.append(line).append("
");&#10;    process.waitFor();&#10;    String result = output.toString();&#10;    if (result.isEmpty()) {&#10;        player.sendSystemMessage(net.minecraft.network.chat.Component.literal("§7命令执行成功，无输出内容"));&#10;    } else {&#10;        player.sendSystemMessage(net.minecraft.network.chat.Component.literal(result));&#10;    }&#10;} catch (Exception e) {&#10;    player.sendSystemMessage(net.minecraft.network.chat.Component.literal("§c执行错误: " + e.getMessage()));&#10;}</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
